name_cn:
Medium
Tote latest Autumn/Winter Paris Map Series, I've been wanting this tote, it's here. It retains the simple bag shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. Can be carried by hand or crossbody, fully meeting daily travel needs. Classic animal embroidery, iconic letters, stylish and versatile with a full vintage vibe
size:36*16*27cm
